name: Sweet Potatoes with Oatmeal Topping
recipeInstructions:
1. Prick potatoes and microwave on high until soft.
2. Scoop flesh into a large bowl and mash with butter, sugar, juice, marmalade, gingerroot, and salt.
3. Spread mixture evenly in 2-quart baking dish sprayed with non-stick spray.
4. Preheat oven to 400°F.
5. Using pastry cutter, combine topping ingredients until mixture resembles coarse meal.
6. Sprinkle topping over potato mixture.
7. Bake in middle of oven until topping is lightly browned, about 25 minutes.
